title: West Burton Solar Farm: development consent order Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by West Burton Solar Project Limited for the construction, operation and maintenance, and decommissioning of a solar photovoltaic array generating facility, energy storage facility and associated infrastructure.  Date of decision  24 January 2025  Company / location   West Burton Solar Project LimitedFulhamLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  Approximately 418MW. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
